title: Fresh and ultra fresh sales increase in Dubai market
description: We believe that expanding fresh category assortment and improving delivery speed for ultra-fresh items will increase tMart fresh GMV by 20% in Dubai within Q2 2026.

assumptions.content: Dubai customers are willing to pay premium for faster fresh delivery

success_signals: Fresh category GMV increases by 20% in Dubai

extracted_context.fact: tMart fresh category grew 23% YoY in Dubai market
extracted_context.relevance: Growth signal suggests demand exists but may be supply-constrained

extracted_context.fact: Weekly Basket Builder persona represents 34% of grocery GMV
extracted_context.relevance: Primary target segment for fresh category expansion

extracted_context.fact: Instashop offers 20-minute fresh delivery in Dubai Marina
extracted_context.relevance: Competitive pressure in premium Dubai areas requires speed parity
